div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 925px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
